aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has foundational elements like FAQ content and contact methods, it lacks the depth of conversational content and structured data needed for AI assistants to confidently cite or recommend the business.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed service and location information.
Expand conversational content to address common HVAC queries and solutions.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, operational status, and contact information, but it lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement to boost visibility.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve search presence.
Q&A section is inactive, missing opportunities for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite having FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for maintenance or installation guides.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions and geo-coordinates.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema and expanding FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts through detailed how-to guides and industry certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content, causing AI models to overlook them in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement comprehensive AEO strategies, including structured data, conversational content, and GBP engagement, to boost AI visibility and capture more leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search, making it critical to act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and voice search platforms.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
